description: Push Claude Code session transcripts (SessionEnd) and compact summaries (PostCompact) to PowerMem via HTTP. Optional UserPromptSubmit: semantic search injects context when POWERMEM_PROMPT_SEARCH=1. Uses native binaries under hooks/bin. macOS/Linux: sh launcher. Windows without sh: merge hooks/hooks.windows.example.json. POWERMEM_BASE_URL defaults to http://localhost:8000 if unset.
